/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/smarthome.dir/src/devices/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smarthome.dir/src/devices/light.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smarthome.dir/src/devices/thermostat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smarthome.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smarthome.dir/src/rules/condition_rule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smarthome.dir/src/rules/scheduled_rule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smarthome.dir/src/sensors/motion_sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smarthome.dir/src/sensors/temperature_sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smarthome.dir/src/system/command_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smarthome.dir/src/system/smart_home_system.cpp.o -o smarthome
